qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Consider the following relational schema: What does the following SQL query output? SELECT sch-name, COUNT (*) FROM School C, Enrolment E, ExamResult R WHERE E.school-id = C.school-id AND E.examname = R.examname AND E.erollno = R.erollno AND R.marks = 100 AND E.school-id IN (SELECT school-id FROM st
